entries.summary: Fix hardcoded macOS paths for Windows workspace.
entries.symptom_before_fix: Scripts and MCP configuration pointed to non-existent /Users/frank/ paths.
entries.root_cause: Hardcoded developer-specific macOS paths in early setup scripts.
entries.what_was_fixed: Replaced all 51 occurrences of /Users/frank/GeminiCLI with C:\Users\barwa\GeminiCLI across 37 files.
entries.why_it_was_fixed: To make the setup portable and functional on Windows 11.
entries.resilience_summary: Future scripts should use %USERPROFILE% or relative paths.
entries.verification: Ran bootstrap-gemini-setup.ps1 and confirmed all components exist.
entries.portability_notes: Uses C:\Users\barwa\GeminiCLI for this machine; future versions should use environment variables.

entries.summary: Harden MCP Code-Search for Windows compatibility.
entries.symptom_before_fix: MCP server failed with ENOENT (tsx not found) and EINVAL (shell execution).
entries.root_cause: Node spawn without shell:true on Windows and missing .cmd extensions for globally installed binaries.
entries.what_was_fixed: Updated .mcp.json to use tsx.cmd and modified code-search-mcp-client.mjs to use shell:true on win32.
entries.why_it_was_fixed: To enable reliable MCP tool execution on Windows 11.
entries.resilience_summary: Always use shell:true when spawning .cmd/.ps1 scripts on Windows.
entries.verification: Successful Search Status tool call during bootstrap smoke test.

entries.summary: Switch to bun:sqlite and bun runtime for code-search MCP.
entries.symptom_before_fix: better-sqlite3 failed to load native bindings on Node v24 (win32-x64).
entries.root_cause: Native binding incompatibility with very new Node versions and missing prebuilds.
entries.what_was_fixed: Modified store.ts to use bun:sqlite on Windows and updated .mcp.json to use bun as the runtime.
entries.why_it_was_fixed: To provide a zero-dependency, stable SQLite environment on Windows without native compilation issues.
entries.resilience_summary: Bun's built-in SQLite is a more robust choice for Windows environments when native Node modules fail.
entries.verification: Successful full reindex of 809 files and verified search results via smoke test.
